_about: self-media-platform MCP config. The open-design MCP server is a stdio bridge to the local open-design daemon (started by `bin/devbox provision` or by `od` CLI). Daemon listens on 127.0.0.1:7456 by default. CC running inside the atelier-smp VM loads this automatically; CC on the host ignores it because the project is in 'host CC reads from /mnt/mac' mode (the host uses its own open-design plugin via ~/.claude/).
